## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: No test validates that 'timeout 120' is present in the Phase 9 Semgrep installation code block. The existing test-onboarding-semgrep.sh tests check only that Semgrep installation guidance exists, not that the timeout guard is applied. The new 'Never block progress if installation fails or times out' bullet is verified indirectly by test_optional_deps_non_blocking, but the Phase 9 timeout wrapping itself has no dedicated assertion.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
Category: verification

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — test coverage gap with no documented justification; timeout 120 is a required invariant from SC2 of epic 903c-44fc (high confidence)

comments.body: Investigation complete. ROOT_CAUSE: test-onboarding-semgrep.sh contains zero assertions for 'timeout 120' — the guard exists in SKILL.md (Phase 1 Step 0 dependency pre-scan at lines 135-143) but is unverified. File path: tests/skills/test-onboarding-semgrep.sh (not tests/scripts/ as stated in ticket). Fix: add test_semgrep_install_timeout_guard function asserting 'timeout 120' appears in SKILL.md Semgrep install block. Testing_mode: UPDATE (adding test for existing correct behavior).
